title: Lover
desc: Arun and Divya have been dating for six years. However, their relationship goes through a rough patch when insecurities and possessiveness creep in.

title: Bhanumathi
desc: Varun, an NRI medical student, and Bhanu, a vivacious, young woman, fall in love with each other. However, they face many personal differences that create complications in their relationship.

title: Eeswaran
desc: Periyasamy's sons decide to visit him with their families. While Eeswaran, his caretaker, oversees the preparations for this visit, he takes it upon himself to protect the family from danger.

title: Kalvan
desc: Kemban abandons his adopted grandfather in a forest to die at the hands of an animal, so that he would be compensated by the forest department. But the old man keeps surviving, which annoys Kemban.

title: Pushpa: The Rise - Part 1
desc: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

title: Vettai
desc: An inspector covertly collaborates with his brother to discipline offenders, but when a gangster uncovers their secret, the officer resolves to train under his sibling to confront the criminal.

title: Eleven
desc: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Aaranya Kaandam
desc: Singaperumal still feels mighty though he has turned older. However, when he tries to beat his arch-enemy Gajendran with a perfect plan, a series of incidents lead to a dog-eat-dog situation.

title: Sathuranga Vettai
desc: A cunning fraudster profits from deceiving numerous victims. However, trouble ensues when a criminal group seeks revenge against his betrayal.

title: Jackpot
desc: Two mischievous grifters stumble upon the secret of a magical vessel from an old lady. Subsequently, they embark on a wild and hilarious adventure to acquire it.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
desc: A powerful smuggler clashes with a rival, navigating deals and a dramatic showdown.

title: To Be Announced
desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

title: Maharaja
desc: After his home is broken into, a barber sets out to get revenge and informs the police about the incident. However, the police are unsure about the missing entity in question.

title: Max
desc: Inspector Arjun arrests two men for crashing into the police station. Soon, he desperately rushes to clear his name as the two are found dead.
